channel.title: Threat Intelligence on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Threat Intelligence on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: security: Turning threat intelligence into decisive action with Defender Experts
item.description:
Microsoft Security describes a Defender Experts post about helping security teams turn threat intelligence into action across endpoints, identities, cloud workloads, and third-party tools. The excerpt emphasizes that teams have more visibility but still face uncertainty from fragmented signals.

  • Source: Microsoft Security Blog

item.title: security: Defending SaaS-based applications against ShinyHunters OAuth abuse
item.description:
Microsoft Threat Intelligence reported ShinyHunters-linked activity targeting SaaS-based applications through OAuth abuse, vishing, supply-chain compromise, and misconfigured guest access. The post focuses on how these techniques were used against SaaS environments and how to defend against them.

  • Source: Microsoft Security Blog

item.title: security: Photo ZIP campaign targeting hospitality industry delivers Node.js implant for persistent access
item.description:
Microsoft Threat Intelligence reported an active multi-stage intrusion campaign targeting hospitality organizations in Europe and Asia. The attackers use photo-themed ZIP archives and fake image shortcut files to deploy a persistent Node.js implant and avoid detection.

  • Source: Microsoft Security Blog
